title: Agent Observability
content: Agent observability means recording traces, logs, and metrics to understand how an AI agent behaves during execution.

title: Agent Debugging
content: Agent debugging helps identify failures such as wrong tool selection, incorrect tool input, repeated tool calls, and unsupported final answers.

title: Agent Monitoring
content: Monitoring agents in production involves tracking latency, error rates, tool-call frequency, repeated actions, and user escalations.

title: Agent Trajectories and Tracing
content: Agent tracing records the trajectory of decisions, tool calls, tool outputs, and final responses during an agent run.
